pi_items.source: Confirmed in task.json metadata (line 18) and task description (line 5). Setup script creates or retrieves this concept if it doesn't exist. Not a standard CIEL concept.
Confirmed in task.json metadata (line 19) and task description (line 4). Verifier.py (lines 52-61) confirms it checks for both 'administrative' and 'cleanup' keywords in lowercase.
Confirmed in task.json metadata (line 20). Consistent with Bahmni environment setup. Base URL is https://localhost, OpenMRS API endpoint is /openmrs, admin interface is /openmrs/admin.

privileged_info_summary: The task targets a synthetic concept named 'Duplicate Diagnosis Code' that is created by the task setup if not already present (not a standard CIEL/OpenMRS concept). The required retire reason is 'Administrative cleanup'. The admin interface is accessible at https://localhost/openmrs/admin in this Bahmni environment. All three metadata claims have been verified against the task definition, setup scripts, and verifier logic.
